title: helper functions
content:
# helper functions

Helper functions that live outside reducers but are critical to editor behavior — pricing calculations, billing breakdowns, cross-model data mapping, and formatting utilities.

## Pricing Calculation (Service Offering)
- [[getUserSelectionPriceBreakdown is the core pricing calculation engine]] — the master pricing function in service-offering/src/utils.ts
- [[pricing-utils provides editor-level formatting and tier price calculations]] — formatPrice, calculateTierRecurringPrice, calculateEffectiveSetupPrice, detectMajorityCycle

## Billing Calculation (Subscription Instance)
- [[billing-utils computes subscription billing breakdowns and metric overages]] — computeBillingBreakdown, formatCurrency, computeMetricOverage

## Cross-Model Bridges
- [[mapOfferingToSubscription transforms service offering state into subscription initialization]] — converts offering final config → subscription init input

## Dependency Graph

```
service-offering/src/utils.ts
  └─ getUserSelectionPriceBreakdown → TheMatrix.tsx

editors/service-offering-editor/components/pricing-utils.ts
  ├─ re-exports BILLING_CYCLE_MONTHS from model
  └─ formatPrice, calculateTierRecurringPrice → ServiceCatalog, TierDefinition, TheMatrix

editors/service-offering-editor/components/resolve-configuration.ts
  └─ resolveConfiguration → TheMatrix.tsx (converts PriceBreakdown → SetFinalConfigurationInput)

editors/subscription-instance-editor/components/billing-utils.ts
  └─ computeBillingBreakdown → BillingPanel.tsx

editors/subscription-instance-editor/components/mapOfferingToSubscription.ts
  └─ mapOfferingToSubscription → ImportServiceConfigButton.tsx
```

---

description: Utility and calculation functions indexed by what they compute and which editors consume them
